response:
evaluate the expression: sqrt{(-5/3)^2} + (27/64)^{-1/3} - pi^0 + log_{1/2} 2  
calculate sqrt{(-5/3)^2}  
sqrt{(-5/3)^2} = sqrt{(25/9)} = 5/3  
calculate (27/64)^{-1/3}  
(27/64)^{-1/3} = (64/27)^{1/3} = 4/3  
calculate pi^0  
pi^0 = 1  
calculate log_{1/2} 2  
log_{1/2} 2 = -1  
add all the results together: 5/3 + 4/3 - 1 + (-1) = 9/3 - 2 = 3 - 2 = 1  

the final result is 1.
